# Ecce Homo

*[Nietzsche](../philosophers/nietzsche.md) · 1888*

A philosophical autobiography subtitled "How One Becomes What One Is", written shortly before Nietzsche's collapse, it rereads his own work and sets out his formula of amor fati. Its tone, at once lucid and excessive, is deliberately provocative.
